description: As an administrator (admin@opencad.local / Admin123!) on the OpenCAD system (http://localhost), create an incident report in the Police Dashboard (MDT) with the title 'Vandalism - Dragline 4'. Use the narrative: 'Upon 0800 perimeter check, discovered spray paint vandalism on the rear counterweight of Dragline 4. No suspects observed. Photos taken.' Set the report type to 'Vandalism' (or 'Other') and leave the civilian field blank or unknown.
